character.name: Female hexer, short black hair,
character.prompt:
Female hexer, short black hair, slim build. Dark vest over dark
shirt, dark pants, tall brown boots. Holds a green-glowing iron
lantern in right hand. Faint floating cursed-green sigil fragments
around body. Green lantern light as primary accent, void-purple
secondary on shadow details. Patient, sinister presence. Dark fantasy
pixel art, Diablo 2 / Hades style, heavy black outline, muted dark
palette with cursed-green and void-purple accent, transparent background.
